function.message: Processed the next inbox item successfully. I ran the requested OCR/frontmatter migration on both specified finance records by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter and preserving each original body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read relevant 99_system workflow/schema docs before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, preserved original record bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to OCR two finance docs. Both target files contained all required visible fields for the finance schema, so I added required YAML frontmatter (invoice/bill fields and lines) without altering source body content, and then removed the processed inbox file per inbox workflow.
